testimonialsSection.title: Client feedback
testimonialsSection.subtitle: How clients describe the value of working with ISOLOGIC.

items.quote: ISOLOGIC clarified our scope and cut the noise. We moved from uncertainty to a concrete plan in days, not weeks.
Their audit preparation pack was spot‑on. Requests from external auditors became structured and fast to resolve.
Pragmatic control design that our teams actually follow. It works in practice, not just on paper.
We gained confidence ahead of a critical client assessment. Evidence was ready and defensible.
Clear actions, owners and timelines. Steering meetings became shorter and more focused.
Independent perspective we needed. Findings were concise and solution‑oriented.
They kept us audit‑ready all year. No last‑minute scramble before certification.
Documentation quality improved across the board. Processes are easier to train and sustain.
